aaaErrors.possibleResolutions:
The payer doesn't recognize the subscriber's name.
• Ensure that the `subscriber.firstName` and `subscriber.lastName` are valid and spelled correctly.
• Enter the patient's name exactly as it appears on their insurance card, if available, including any special or punctuation characters such as apostrophes, hyphens (dashes), or spaces. Review our other best practices for [entering patient names](https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/send-eligibility-checks#patient-names).
